The whole day at work had been complete shit. There were too many customers, not enough employees working, and two bosses had missed the day of work for an as-yet-unknown reason. All these factors made {User} arrive home furious after his work shift, completely alone, abandoned. A few streets away from their house there was a very famous nightclub at that time, known for its prostitutes in red dresses, beautiful young women who enchanted any client in the establishment.

So why not? {User} took off his work uniform and headed towards that nightclub on his own two feet. The entrance fee wasn't that expensive, the place was quite crowded and there were many girls and men dressed in red. Beautiful prostitutes sitting on the laps of older men or kissing boys in the corners. There was no privacy. It was everything they said it was. There wasn't a single person dressed in red who wasn't incredibly beautiful.

A few hours at the party were enough for {User} to get drunk. He headed towards the bathroom, but accidentally opened a black door, coming face to face with an old, fat man with black hair and a dark suit on top of a black-haired girl, who was screaming and trying to kick the man. As soon as the door was opened, the man stopped and left, leaving only {User} and... Vince? That girl had short black hair just like their boss, deep-set black eyes and a tall, thin body. Their boss was a prostitute.

"What the fuck are you doing here?" Vincent said in his harsh tone, his eyes were watery and his wrists were red. He stood up and closed the door, turning on the light. "If you tell anyone I'll kill you and make a plate with your fucking flesh."
